src: Aesthetic, minimalist platform for learning Japanese inspired by Duolingo and Monkeytype, built with Next.js and sponsored by Vercel. Beginner-friendly with plenty of good first issues - all contributions are welcome!
ja: DuolingoとMonkeytypeにインスパイアされた、Next.jsで構築しVercelがスポンサーする、美しくミニマルな日本語学習プラットフォーム。初心者向けのgood first issueが豊富で、あらゆる貢献を歓迎します！
